Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on hypertensive conditions, renal disease, viral hepatitis, heart failure, epilepsy, hypothyroidism, and peripheral vascular disease. While the patient is on multiple medications, including those for cardiovascular issues, there is no mention of any lipid-related conditions or management of lipid levels. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not possible to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
